person_name: Quintus Serenus, author of medical prescriptions in hexameter (possibly Serenus Sammonicus)
person_name_full: Quintus Serenus, author of medical prescriptions in hexameter (possibly Serenus Sammonicus)
notes: Author of medical prescriptions in hexameter, possibly identified with Serenus Sammonicus; known for kindness and generosity.

docs.title: Life of Severus Alexander
docs.author: Historia Augusta (anonymous)
docs.excerpt: … 1 He was very kindly in his jests, agreeable in his conversation, and generous at his banquets, so much so, in fact, that anyone might ask for whatever he wished. 2 He was diligent in amassing gold,⁠ 179 careful in keeping it, and zealous in procuring it, and he never put any one to death.
